claims.summary: Codec scaling already varies within bounded fill, pressure, and aperture constraints.
claims.disposition: verify adaptive gain, pressure governor, feature clamp, and vibrancy-aperture tests

claims.summary: Content density may be a missing discriminator when entropy and tail texture are held fixed.
claims.disposition: observe the fresh low-content versus high-density contrast without changing runtime math

claims.summary: Changing dynamic gain, aperture ceiling, clamp, or density weighting changes live codec behavior.
